zh.lifeSummary: 當Elen ferch Llywelyn於1207年出生時，她的父親Llywelyn ab Iorwerth33歲，母親Joan Lady of Wales19歲。她於1222年與John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester結婚。她去世於1253年2月16日之前在威爾士卡迪甘史爾，埋葬在威爾士卡迪甘史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elen ferch Llywelyn于1207年出生时，她的父亲Llywelyn ab Iorwerth33岁，母亲Joan Lady of Wales19岁。她于1222年与John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester结婚。她去世于1253年2月16日之前在威尔士卡迪甘史爾，埋葬在威尔士卡迪甘史爾。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

en.lifeSummary: When Elen ferch Llywelyn was born in 1207, her father, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, was 33 and her mother, Joan Lady of Wales, was 19. She married John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester in 1222. She died before 16 February 1253, in Cardiganshire, Wales, and was buried in Cardiganshire, Wales.

fr.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elen ferch Llywelyn est née en 1207, son père, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Lady of Wales, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester en 1222. Elle est décédée avant 16 février 1253, à Cardiganshire, Galles, et a été enterrée à Cardiganshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elen ferch Llywelyn 1207 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 33 und ihre Mutter Joan Lady of Wales 19. Sie hat 1222 John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester geheiratet. Sie starb vor 16. Februar 1253 in Cardiganshire, Wales und wurde in Cardiganshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elen ferch Llywelyn è nata il nel 1207, sua padre, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan Lady of Wales, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester nel 1222. Morì prima del 16 febbraio 1253, nel Cardiganshire, Galles, e fu sepolta a Cardiganshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelynが1207年に生まれた時，父Llywelyn ab Iorwerthは33歳，母Joan Lady of Walesは19歳であった。1222年にJohn of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chesterと結婚した。彼女は1253年2月16日以前にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアで死去し，ウェールズカーディガンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn(이)가 1207년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Lady of Wales(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1222년 John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1253년 2월 16일 이전 웨일스 카디건실르에서 사망했으며 웨일스 카디건실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elen ferch Llywelyn nasceu em 1207, seu pai, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Lady of Wales, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester em 1222. Ela faleceu antes 16 de fevereiro de 1253, em Cardiganshire, Gales, e foi sepultada em Cardiganshire, Gales.

ro.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elen ferch Llywelyn родилась в 1207 г., её отцу по имени Llywelyn ab Iorwerth было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Lady of Wales, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester в 1222 г. Она умерла перед 16 февраль 1253 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс и была похоронена в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс.

sm.1222 to 1237: mai le 1222 e o'o I le 1237

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elen ferch Llywelyn nació en 1207, su papá, Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Lady of Wales, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John of Scotland Earl of Huntingdon and Chester en 1222. Murió antes de 16 de febrero de 1253, en Cardiganshire, Gales, y fue sepultada en Cardiganshire, Gales.
